     the Fermi energy is    -0.4733 ev

!    total energy              =  -11771.86324800 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <          1.8E-09 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.08770743 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -11771.77554057 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -238667.20258985 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  120434.77345889 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -4211.06335685 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  110674.73167207 Ry
     DFT-D3 Dispersion         =      -3.01472483 Ry

     total magnetization       =    43.00 Bohr mag/cell
     absolute magnetization    =    53.66 Bohr mag/cell

     convergence has been achieved in  37 iterations
